name: Side-by-Side Two-Person (Vertical) with Particle-Burst Captions
description: BIZDRIVE-style vertical 2-person format: two talking-head cams placed SIDE BY SIDE (left + right rectangles) in a 1080×1920 frame — an interview / conversation / 2-cam podcast layout — with centered particle-burst captions (same word-pop + gold #FFD700 system as Template 01) sitting centered over the seam between the two cams. Audio master is a single combined track (bottom.mp4 = the room/interview audio carrying both voices); the second cam (top.mp4) is muted video only. Layout is a new family (side-by-side); caption system = particle-burst (Template 01 colors).

leftFrame.content: cam A (top.mp4) — muted video; also the B-roll insert host

rightFrame.content: cam B (bottom.mp4) — audio master, muted in composition

layout.seam: 30px gap at x=525 (frame edges 525 / 555), symmetric 15px outer margins
layout.captionPosition: centered horizontally AND vertically over the seam between the two cams, bottom: 910px. This position is HARDCODED in scripts/build-burst-captions.py (the burst builder reads paths + duration from fixed locations and does NOT read argv). tools/v88-clip.sh sets CAPTION_BOTTOM=910 for T09 to match (informational — the burst builder ignores it; only the highlight builder reads it).

captions.style: BIZDRIVE particle-burst — each caption group pops word-by-word with a 10-particle burst; brand/number/tech tokens render gold (#FFD700). Same system + colors as Template 01. Positioned centered over the seam between the two cams (bottom 910).
captions.goldTokenRules: numbers, monetary figures, durations, brand/tech names, headline tickers

audio.note: bottom.mp4 carries the combined interview audio (both speakers). For a 2-person recording captured on one device/room mic this is a single track; both video divs are muted in the composition and final audio is the polished speech_polished.wav derived from bottom_visual_master.mp4.
audio.polishChain: highpass80, lowpass12k, afftdn, agate, acompressor, loudnorm 2-pass, alimiter, apad

broll.host: left frame (cam A) — B-roll inserts cover cam A while cam B keeps talking
broll.aiGenNote: seedance-1-5-pro chosen 2026-05-20: ~$0.02 per 3-5s clip at 720p, ~10x cheaper than seedance-2.0-fast at equivalent quality. Use resolution 720p, 16:9, generate_audio false.

sfx.pacing: ~1 SFX per 12s of final video; fewer for clips under 60s
sfx.note: Every clip gets SFX but kept sparse — at most 5, each context-matched to the beat it lands on (whoosh on transitions, ding on CTA/follow-card, punch on punchlines, riser before reveals). mix-sfx.py enforces the rule and writes output/finals/final.mp4.

label.th: ตัดช่วงเงียบ (dead air)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 6 (Silero VAD); Step 7 ใช้แค่ rough EDL — คงจังหวะพูดเดิมไว้

label.th: ปรับแต่งเสียงพูด (polish)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 8 — ใช้เสียงดิบจาก visual master; Step 9 re-transcribe ใช้เสียงดิบแทน

label.th: ซับ / คำบรรยายไทย

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 9-11 ส่วน caption (re-transcribe, post-process subagent, build-*-captions.py); ไม่ mount caption track
ข้าม generate-broll + add-broll.py — ไม่มีภาพแทรก

label.th: จำนวนสูงสุด
เพลงประกอบ (BGM)

features.whenOff: mix-sfx.py ข้าม BGM — final.mp4 = speech (+ SFX) เท่านั้น

label.th: ระดับเสียง
เอฟเฟกต์เสียง (SFX)

features.whenOff: sfx-plan.json มี sfx: [] ว่าง — ไม่มีเอฟเฟกต์เสียง
ข้าม Step 16 — ส่งมอบ output/finals/final.mp4 โดยไม่ฝัง cover art

label.th: บรรทัดบน (ขาว)
บรรทัดเด่น (ทอง)
บรรทัดล่าง (ฟ้า)

reference.note: New template created 2026-06-08; no locked golden-reference clip yet. Layout is a new side-by-side family (cousin of the stacked/split templates). Caption system + colors reuse Template 01 (particle-burst, gold #FFD700) via scripts/build-burst-captions.py. Pipeline contract is identical to Template 08 (bottom.mp4 = audio master, top.mp4 = muted second cam) so the locked v88 16-step flow is unchanged — only the composition geometry (left/right) and caption position differ. Validate on a real 2-cam job before locking a golden reference.
